# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 0.x.x   | ✅        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/achimismaili/easy-web/security/advisories/new).

Do **not** file a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

We aim to respond within 48 hours and will keep you informed of progress.
